title: Steady Nourishment
subtitle: Finding a gentle rhythm
description: At this stage, you may begin to notice slight stability in your appetite, although sensitivity can still be present. Establishing a gentle and predictable eating rhythm can help support your energy and comfort.
what_to_expect: Reduced but still present food sensitivities
Better understanding of what foods suit you
nutrition_focus: Build a gentle and consistent eating routine
Gradually include more variety if comfortable
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, and sabzi
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, or orange
Cooked vegetables like लौकी, spinach, and carrots
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, or eggs (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals due to mild discomfort
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include coconut water, buttermilk, or fresh lemon water
reassurance: A gentle and steady routine can help you feel more comfortable and supported.

diabetes.personalized_description: Establishing consistent meal patterns supports stable energy and blood sugar levels.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Regular routines support stability and comfort.

anemia.personalized_description: With improving appetite, continuing iron-rich foods can further support your energy.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Steady nutrition helps build your strength over time.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced and consistent meals support stable blood pressure and comfort.
hypertension.reassurance: Consistency in meals supports a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A steady and consistent diet supports overall metabolic balance.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps your body stay balanced and steady.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, building a steady and balanced eating routine can help maintain overall stability.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, steady improvements in your diet can support your overall well-being.
